title: Xeriscape Tender Argentinian Chicken Liver Bread
description: A grassy, tender monsoon-inspired Argentinian dish featuring chicken liver and double-rise-bread, ovo-vegetarian-friendly, cooked in a kadhai.
instructions: Combine yeast and warm water in a bowl and let it sit for 5 minutes.
Add flour, salt, and black pepper to the bowl and mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Heat 20ml of olive oil in a kadhai over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and cook for 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add chicken liver and cook for 5 minutes until browned.
Add smoked paprika and lemon juice, stir to combine.
Shape the risen dough into a round and place it on a baking sheet.
Bake the bread in the preheated oven for 25 minutes until golden brown.
Let the bread cool for 5 minutes before slicing.
Serve the bread with the chicken liver mixture on top.
